% Auto-generated. Do not edit by hand.
\section*{Linear State Preparation}

We benchmark the preparation of an \(n\)-qubit state with linearly increasing amplitudes,
\[
|\psi\rangle = \frac{1}{\sqrt{M}} \sum_{x=0}^{2^n-1} x \, |x\rangle ,
\]
where
\[
M = \sum_{x=0}^{2^n-1} x^2 .
\]
The score is defined from the total variation distance between the observed output distribution \(p\) and the ideal distribution \(u\),
\[
D_{\mathrm{TV}}(p,u) = \frac{1}{2}\sum_{i=0}^{2^n-1} |p_i-u_i| .
\]
We then define
\[
S = 1 - \frac{D_{\mathrm{TV}}(p,u)}{1-1/n}.
\]
\smallskip

For more details see \href{https://github.com/Classiq/classiq-library/tree/main/benchmarking/benchmarks/benchmark\_state\_preparation.ipynb}{Benchmark State Preparation notebook}.
\medskip
